currency.description: Currency in which user wants to pay for onramp asset. (NGN, USD)

amount.description: Amount user wishes to onramp based on currency selected. (Min ~ 15K NGN,  20USD)

stables.description: Stable coin in which user wants to be settle in.(USDC, USDT)

vendor_bank.description: Use the "Fetch Payment Vendors" ENDPOINT to fetch the list of supported payment vendors

wallet_address.description: Wallet address where the on-ramp stablecoin token will be sent to.

network.description: The address network to disburse payment. Our supported networks are (Wallet address network. Our supported networks are (Arbitrum, Avalanche, Stellar, Base, Polygon, Solana, Stellar, Tron, XRPL).

bank_name.description: Proof of payment Bank used to send money to the vendor account

account_number.description: Proof of payment Account number of bank used to send money to the vendor account.

routing_number.description: Proof of payment Bank Routing number used to send money to the vendor account

bank_address.description: Optional for transactions that provide bank transaction address

developer_fee.description: Businesses that wish to charge a certain percentage on your their users for each transaction made.

stables.description: Stable coin in which user wants to off-ramp in. (USDC, USDT)

amount.description: Amount in (USDC/USDT) that the users wishes to offramp into a USD or NGN bank account. (Min ~ 20 USDT / USDC).

currency.description: Currency in which user wants to receive funds. (NGN,USD)

bank_name.description: Use the "fetch Payment banks" ENDPOINT to fetch the list of supported payment banks. Only the name needs to be passed

account_number.description: Customer's bank account number for where funds should be sent to.

account_name.description: Bank name associated with bank account number provided above.

wallet_address.description: Origin wallet address where funds would be sent from.

network.description: Wallet address network. Our supported networks are (Arbitrum, Avalanche, Stellar, Base, Polygon, Solana, Stellar, Tron, XRPL)

routing_number.description: Please provide routing number for USD request.

account_type.description: Please select either checkings or savings for USD request.

chargeFeeOnRequest.description: Setting this option to true, allows users see what amount they receive after the fee has been deducted. Currently available for payout to NGN accounts only.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount in BRL to convert. Minimum 20,000 IDR

parameters.name: business_id
parameters.description: Your LINK business identifier

amount.description: IDR amount to convert (amount used in to get quote).

wallet_address.description: Wallet address where token will be sent to.

bankName.description: Full name of the beneficiary bank. Use the "Fetch Payment banks" ENDPOINT to fetch the list of supported payment banks for IDR.

bankCode.description: The bank’s ISO/local code. Use the "Fetch Payment banks" ENDPOINT to fetch the bank code for IDR bank selected.

post.description: Register a new business customer. Returns a unique `CustomerID` and a KYB link for compliance verification. Requires an `idempotency-key` header to prevent duplicate submissions. Not available in test mode.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: A unique key (e.g. UUID) to prevent duplicate customer creation on retries.

business_name.description: Legal name of the customer's business.

phone_number.description: Business phone number including country code.

registered_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. NGA, USA, GBR).

CustomerID.description: Unique customer ID to pass in onramp/offramp requests.

KYB_Link.description: KYB form link for compliance verification.

400.description: Missing/invalid fields or duplicate idempotency key.

403.description: Endpoint not available in test mode.

get.description: Retrieve a single customer by `customer_id`. Not available in test mode.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The customer ID returned when the customer was created.

403.description: Endpoint not available in test mode.

get.description: Retrieve all customers registered under your business account. Not available in test mode.

403.description: Endpoint not available in test mode.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Fiat currency used to onramp or receive offramp.

parameters.name: trx_type
parameters.description: Transaction type: "onramp" for "Fiat"→USDC, "offramp" for USDC→"Fiat".

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount Business wants to Onramp(Fiat) OR offramp(Stables).

post.description: Initiate a fiat → stablecoin onramp via LINK’s OTC desk. Provide core transaction details plus your banking details (the account you are paying FROM). Once a transaction (onramp) has been initiated, settlement account details are delivered to you through a `banking_details_received` webhook.

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid fields

customer_id.description: Your platform’s customer ID for this transaction.

wallet_address.description: Destination wallet address for the stablecoin.

paymentDetails.description: Your banking details — the account you are paying FROM. Required fields depend on your currency’s payment method. Call GET /otc/rate_quote first to get the paymentMethod for your currency.

oneOf.title: Local Bank Transfer (AED, AOA, BIF, CDF, DZD, EGP, ETB, EUR, GBP, LYD, MAD, MUR, MWK, MZN, SGD, SLE, SSP, TRY, TZS, UGX, XAF, XOF)

post.description: Initiate a stablecoin → fiat payout via LINK’s OTC desk. Provide core transaction details plus your settlement banking details (the account you want to receive fiat INTO).

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid fields

customer_id.description: Your platform’s customer ID for this transaction.

paymentDetails.description: Your settlement banking details — the account you want to receive fiat INTO. Required fields depend on your currency’s payment method. Call GET /otc/rate_quote first to get the paymentMethod for your currency.

oneOf.title: Local Bank Transfer (AED, AOA, BIF, CDF, DZD, EGP, ETB, EUR, GBP, LYD, MAD, MUR, MWK, MZN, SGD, SLE, SSP, TRY, TZS, UGX, XAF, XOF)

post.description: Upload proof of payment for an existing OTC onramp transaction. Submit after transferring fiat to the settlement account so the partner can confirm receipt. Accepts JPEG, PNG, GIF, or PDF files up to 2 MB.

reference.description: The transaction reference returned when the onramp was created (e.g. link-otc-12345678).

file.description: Proof of payment file. Accepted types: JPEG, PNG, GIF, PDF. Maximum size: 3 MB.

200.description: Proof of payment uploaded and forwarded to the OTC partner.

400.description: Validation error — missing fields, unsupported file type, or file exceeds 3 MB.

message.example: File too large. Please reduce the file size to under 3 MB.

404.description: Transaction not found for the given reference.

503.description: OTC bot unavailable — proof of payment could not be forwarded. Retry later.

get.description: Retrieve paginated onramp and/or offramp transactions for your business. Supports filtering by transaction type and date range. Results are sorted newest first.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction direction. Omit to return both onramp and offramp transactions.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of transactions per page. Defaults to 20, maximum 100.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-01-01). Inclusive.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-06-30). Inclusive — covers the full day up to 23:59:59.

total.description: Total matching transactions across all pages.

parameters.name: transaction_reference
parameters.description: Reference generated for each transaction request.

get.description: Query list of supported vendor account details for onramp transaction

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Pass selected currency NGN, USD to get vendor bank details

get.description: Query all available banks for a specified currency

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Pass selected currency NGN, USD, BRL to get Bank list.

get.description: .Query available wallet addresses for offramp transaction.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Pass selected currency to get vendor bank details.

get.description: For customer's who hold funds in house with LINK.
This endpoint can be used to verify a Nigeria bank account number

parameters.name: account_number
parameters.description: Customer account number.

parameters.name: bank_code
parameters.description: Get value for this field from the "Get payment banks endpoint".

post.description: verify users identification. This endpoint is currently only available for Nigeria customers.

idType.description: Verification ID types: NIN, BVN, Voters Card
